channel.title: Exhibit blog
channel.description: Data-driven analysis and changelog from Exhibit — ABA 509 law school data.

item.title: The full 2011–2025 ABA 509 record is now live on every school page
item.description: The full 2011–2025 ABA Standard 509 record is now live on every school page — not just the latest cycle. Here's what shipped, and why it matters if you're weighing a law degree.

item.title: Bar passage across U.S. law schools, 2011–2025: the 15-year picture
item.description: The median first-time bar passage rate across reporting ABA law schools moved from 86% in 2011 to 82% in 2025. But the national median hides big school-level swings — here's the 15-year picture, and the schools that improved most.

item.title: Where law school tuition rose fastest, 2011–2025
item.description: Sticker tuition has climbed almost everywhere since 2011 — but how fast varies wildly by school. Using each school's first and most-recent reported resident tuition, here are the steepest increases.
